name: Kontent.ai Headless CMS API
what_it_does: Kontent.ai REST and Management APIs for headless content management platform. Enables AI agents to query and deliver structured content, manage content items and types, trigger content workflows, and integrate Kontent.ai into omnichannel publishing pipelines. Kontent.ai supports structured content modeling with strong editorial workflow capabilities.
use_cases: Querying and delivering structured content from Kontent.ai for omnichannel publishing agents
Managing content items and taxonomies from content operations agents
Triggering editorial workflow transitions from content pipeline agents
Integrating Kontent.ai content into personalization and marketing automation agents
not_for: Simple static site content without structured modeling needs
best_when: A digital team using Kontent.ai wants AI agents to manage structured content, trigger publishing workflows, and deliver content across web, mobile, and other channels.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Content may include draft or unpublished materials. Management API credentials provide write access — scope carefully.

auth.notes: Kontent.ai uses project API keys — Delivery API key (read-only) and Management API key (read/write). Secure Preview API key for draft content. Keys are project-scoped.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Starter plan: limited content items, API calls, and environments
pricing.paid_tiers: Scale and Enterprise plans with higher limits, custom environments, and SSO
pricing.notes: Free plan suitable for development. Paid plans scale with content volume and team size.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; Delivery API optimized with CDN caching

known_agent_gotchas: Two separate API keys needed: Delivery API (read) and Management API (write) — don't confuse them
No public MCP server — REST or GraphQL integration required
Delivery API uses CDN caching — cache invalidation may lag content updates by seconds
Management API has stricter rate limits than Delivery API
Content type codenames (slugs) are immutable once set — plan content model carefully
agent_readiness.security_notes: Separate read/write API keys. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU data residency available. Management API key provides full write access — store securely.

security_score_components.security_notes: API key auth with separate delivery/management scopes. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU data residency.
